message:
test(oracle): add 21 conformance tests (s490-s510) covering correlated LIKE/BETWEEN/CASE subqueries, RETURNING, CTE, window funcs, CAST edges

New test suites: correlated LIKE in EXISTS, correlated BETWEEN UPDATE,
correlated CASE aggregate subquery, nested function expressions, INSERT/
DELETE/UPDATE RETURNING, multi-table correlated, ORDER BY expressions,
GROUP_CONCAT separators, NULLIF/IIF/COALESCE edges, subquery in INSERT
VALUES, UPDATE with IN subquery, DELETE with correlated EXISTS, compound
SELECT, CAST edge cases, LIKE ESCAPE, window ROW_NUMBER/RANK/DENSE_RANK,
recursive CTE graph reachability, multi-column IN, complex HAVING.

All 829 pass, 0 fail, 12 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
